title: The Microsoft Pyramid Scheme, By Bill Parish
bodyHtml:
The Microsoft Pyramid Scheme, By Bill Parish

Portland, Oregon,  November 28, 2001

I was the first to disclose how Microsoft’s scheme works, emulated by Enron, and specifically how Microsoft pays zero federal income tax.  This included discussions with leading reporters at the NY Times, Wall Street Journal and other publications and training them how to analyze the financial statements in a way that unlocks the scheme.

Read the full report below:

The Microsoft Pyramid Scheme, By Bill Parish
bodyText:
The Microsoft Pyramid Scheme, By Bill Parish

Portland, Oregon, November 28, 2001

I was the first to disclose how Microsoft’s scheme works, emulated by Enron, and specifically how Microsoft pays zero federal income tax. This included discussions with leading reporters at the NY Times, Wall Street Journal and other publications and training them how to analyze the financial statements in a way that unlocks the scheme.
